About ICIIT 2024

 

2024 International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology (ICIIT 2024)  has been held successfully in Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam (Online+Offline) during February 23-25, 2024.

Publication: ACM Conference Proceedings (ISBN: 979-8-4007-1671-3)(Click), indexed by Ei Compendex and Scopus

Group Photo

(1) Opening Remarks by Dr. Duc Ngoc Minh Dang from FPT University, Vietnam, (2) Keynote Speech by Prof. Vinod A. Prasad from Singapore Institute of Technology, Singapore, (3) Keynote Speech by Prof. Eui-Nam Huh from Kyung Hee University, South Korea, (4)Invited Speech by Prof. Masaomi Kimura from Shibaura Institute Technology, Japan, (5)Invited Speech by Assist. Prof. Balachandran Manavalan from Sungkyunkwan University (SKKU), South Korea, (6) Invited Speech by Dr. Hung Dang from FPT Corporation, Vietnam

Session Photos
